---
name: Feature Proposal
about: Reques the addition of a new feature
title: "[Feature Proposal]"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Proposal Overview**
A clear and concise, 1-line overview of the feature proposal.

**Preamble**
What are the reasons behind it? What are the main goals of the proposal?

**Details**
A detailed paragraph on the implementation of the feature.

**Applications**
Uses of the feature if implemented.

**Additional information**
Add any other information about the proposal here.
